title: Adaptive Regime Integration + Rotation Strategy Auto-Research
summary: Integrated adaptive regime detection (SMA200, momentum72, no volatile override) into market-state.ts. Ran auto-research for rotation-15m-trend-up block family across the full data period (2020-10 to 2026-03).

phase1_changes.description: Added buildAdaptiveRegimeSeries to market-state.ts with opt-in useAdaptiveRegime flag

default_regime_distribution.problem: Default SMA(55) + volatilityThreshold(0.03) classifies nearly half of crypto data as volatile

adaptive_regime_distribution.improvement: Eliminates useless volatile classification, doubles trend_up detection

notes: Positive net return (0.70%) with very low drawdown (0.88%)
Strategy correctly trades only during adaptive regime trend_up periods (16.4% of time)
Underperforms buy-and-hold because it's in cash during most of the market's trend periods
The rotation strategy needs to be combined with other regime strategies (trend_down, range) in a portfolio for full market coverage
Engine seed mutations converged quickly, suggesting the parameter space has a clear optimum

bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added useAdaptiveRegime to the Omit<> type parameter

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: block-evaluator ran runMultiStrategyBacktest without marketStateConfig, preventing adaptive regime from taking effect
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added marketStateConfig: { useAdaptiveRegime: true } for rotation families

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Rotation strategy had double regime gating (internal + external withRegimeGate)
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Made rotation families use allowAllRegimes in block gate, letting strategy's own checks handle gating

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Rotation block family was missing sleeveId: 'trend' causing ConflictResolver to block all signals as 'unknown_sleeve'
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added sleeveId: 'trend' and family: 'trend' to the rotation block family definition
